---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'triage']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
Describe a typical use case for this feature. Who would use it and how?

## Implementation Ideas
If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, describe them here (e.g., new command, configuration option, template changes).

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request here.

## Impact
- **User Impact**: How many users would benefit?
- **Complexity**: Estimated implementation difficulty (Low/Medium/High)
- **Priority**: How important is this to your workflow? (Low/Medium/High)
